scenes.voice_text: Living with diabetes means making hundreds of decisions every day. What to eat, when to dose, what that number means right now. GluMira was built to make those decisions clearer.
scenes.subtitle_text: Hundreds of decisions, every day. GluMira makes them clearer.
scenes.visual_note: A CGM-style line drifts gently above target, then smoothly returns to range as GluMira wordmark fades in

scenes.voice_text: It starts with your profile. Your insulin, your diet, your body. GluMira learns your specifics — not a generic average.
scenes.subtitle_text: Your insulin. Your diet. Your profile.
scenes.visual_note: Animated profile card assembles itself — name, insulin type, meal regime, target range

scenes.voice_text: IOB Hunter tracks exactly how much insulin is still working in your body. It's one of the most important numbers in diabetes management — and most apps never show it. We do.
scenes.subtitle_text: Active insulin, tracked in real time. Always.
scenes.visual_note: A smooth pharmacokinetic decay curve animates across a 4-hour timeline. A warning glow appears when IOB overlaps a new dose, then resolves

scenes.voice_text: After a few days, GluMira's pattern engine starts finding what you can't always see — recurring lows at the same time, post-meal spikes, nighttime trends.
scenes.subtitle_text: Patterns you might miss. GluMira finds them.
scenes.visual_note: 7-day glucose grid animates in, then three recurring low clusters are highlighted simultaneously with a soft glow

scenes.voice_text: Log meals, doses, and readings. Or connect your CGM and let live data do the work. GluMira fits around your life — not the other way around.
scenes.subtitle_text: Manual logging or live CGM. Your choice.
scenes.visual_note: Phone screen shows manual log entry, then transitions to a live CGM feed populating automatically

scenes.voice_text: Every clinic visit, you can share a clean, structured report — patterns, time in range, insulin events. No more trying to remember. No more blank looks.
scenes.subtitle_text: Reports your doctor will actually understand.
scenes.visual_note: A clinical report PDF assembles itself with TIR bar, glucose graph, and IOB event list

scenes.voice_text: GluMira doesn't replace your doctor or your instincts. It gives you the information to work with both. Let's get your profile set up.
scenes.subtitle_text: Better information. Better decisions. Let's begin.
scenes.visual_note: Full GluMira dashboard fades in, all panels populated, owl logo pulses gently
